overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a flying car navigating through a dense futuristic neon-lit city at night. The vehicle weaves between skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements, lands briefly on an elevated platform near a cylindrical tower, and continues through darker industrial districts before arriving at Corpo Plaza with large holographic fish sculptures.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon-lit urban canyon with elevated highways

agents.ego_description: piloting the flying car at high speed through narrow gaps between skyscrapers and elevated highways

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with COLA branding on building facade
tall building with green neon window lighting and balconies
modern glass office tower with reflective windows
multi-level highway structure running through the city canyon
building with traditional East Asian architectural roof elements mixed with modern

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed flight through a dense urban canyon illuminated by neon signs and billboards. The flying car weaves between modern glass skyscrapers and elevated highway structures, with a prominent COLA billboard visible on the right and neon-lit residential towers on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated landing platform near cylindrical commercial tower

events.description: flying car slows down and descends to land on an elevated platform
transition from narrow canyon to open platform area with view of cylindrical tower

agents.ego_description: landing the flying car on an elevated platform near the cylindrical tower, hovering briefly before preparing for takeoff

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building covered in holographic advertisements and vertical neon signage
concrete landing pad with safety railings on elevated structure
large vertical billboard with Kiroshi branding and Japanese text

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows down and descends to land on an elevated platform, transitioning from the enclosed canyon to a more open area dominated by a large cylindrical tower covered in advertisements. The platform offers a view of the city plaza below and surrounding neon-lit structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district dominated by cylindrical tower with holographic advertisements

events.description: flying car banks sharply around the cylindrical tower in a tight turn
passing close to large vertical neon billboards and holographic displays on tower

agents.ego_description: executing tight aerial maneuvers and banking turns around the cylindrical tower while maintaining high altitude

entered.detail: tall vertical neon signs with red and purple lighting on building facades
network of elevated pedestrian bridges connecting buildings
building with large 'softsys' signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: Taking off from the platform, the vehicle performs agile aerial maneuvers around the cylindrical tower, weaving past vertical neon billboards and elevated walkways. The scene is dominated by intense neon lighting from advertisements covering the surrounding skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial canyon between office towers with minimal signage

events.description: entering darker corridor with significantly reduced neon lighting and more shadow
flying through narrow gap between tall buildings temporarily blocking side views

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow dark passages between high-rise buildings with reduced visibility and dim lighting

entered.detail: billboard with 'FOURTHWALL' text visible on building side
tall office building with dark tinted glass and minimal lighting
metal bridge structure connecting industrial buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a darker, more industrial district with fewer neon signs and narrower corridors between buildings. The lighting shifts to dimmer tones as the car navigates through tight gaps between dark glass office towers, passing a 'FOURTHWALL' billboard before emerging toward a more open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: Corpo Plaza with holographic art installations and urban greenery

events.description: emerging from dark corridor into open plaza with large holographic fish displays
descending toward plaza level for landing near the holographic sculptures

agents.ego_description: approaching Corpo Plaza and descending toward the landing area, passing large holographic fish sculptures

entered.detail: large glowing red holographic koi fish sculpture floating above plaza
large glowing blue holographic koi fish sculpture floating above plaza
trees and greenery arranged in the urban plaza space
circular building or structure at the center of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark industrial corridor, the scene opens into Corpo Plaza, featuring large holographic red and blue fish sculptures floating above a landscaped urban space with trees. The vehicle descends toward the plaza landing zone, passing the glowing holographic displays and circular central structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed aerial journey through a neon-drenched metropolis that transitions from dense urban canyons into a dark industrial corridor before opening into a grand corporate plaza. It begins with a rapid flight between glass skyscrapers and elevated highways, weaving past a prominent COLA billboard and glowing residential towers. As the vehicle slows, the enclosed canyon expands into an open landing platform dominated by a massive cylindrical tower, where the camera performs agile maneuvers around vertical advertisements and elevated walkways. The scene then shifts into a dimmer, more oppressive industrial district, navigating tight gaps between dark glass office towers and a FOURTHWALL billboard. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into the expansive Corpo Plaza, descending toward a circular central structure beneath towering holographic red and blue fish sculptures.
